landing.heroTitle: Controlled property collaboration for professional agents
landing.heroBody: Post a verified client requirement, receive matching properties from trusted agents, and present only the best to your client — with every step protected, permission-controlled and audited.

pillars.protectBody: Buyers and tenants never see the supplying agent. Co-broke partners never see your client.
pillars.controlBody: Only properties you approve reach your client, through a secure private presentation link.
pillars.auditBody: Declarations, commission agreements and negotiations are versioned and audited.

auth.resetSent: If an account exists for that email, a reset link has been sent.
auth.verifyBody: We have sent a confirmation link to your email address. Click the link in the email to activate your account, then sign in.

errors.weak_password: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.email_in_use: An account with this email may already exist.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

dashboard.title: Agent dashboard
dashboard.statusNote: Complete your agent verification to create requirements and submit properties.

verification.title: Agent verification
verification.intro: Provide your professional details and documents. An administrator will review your submission before you can create requirements or submit properties.
verification.submittedNotice: Submitted. Your verification is now under review.
verification.lockedNotice: Your submission is being processed. You will be notified when the review is complete.
verification.documentsHint: JPG, PNG, WebP or PDF, max 5 MB each. Stored privately; visible only to administrators.

errors.invalid_fields: Please check the highlighted fields and try again.
errors.missing_documents: Licence and identity documents are required.
errors.invalid_file_type: File type not allowed. Use JPG, PNG, WebP or PDF.
errors.file_too_large: A file exceeds the 5 MB limit.
errors.save_failed: Could not save. Please try again.
errors.not_allowed: Your current status does not allow submission.

errors.notes_required: Notes are required for this decision.
